findings.message: Added four deeper PlayMode tests covering event_player_captured/game-over restart, final chase trigger, stage clear persistence, and finale event-chain execution.
Unity MCP script validation reported zero diagnostics for Stage1DeepFlowPlayModeTests.cs.
Unity MCP test discovery now finds 13 tests: 6 EditMode and 7 PlayMode.
PlayMode test job 9bfa412da10f44b3a07b9d12a3eb05b8 succeeded: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped.
EditMode test job e7cd4217f8bf46a785c97585580180c3 succeeded: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped.
These tests execute runtime events directly. They do not replace a click-by-click puzzle walkthrough or manual hit-area tuning pass.

followups: Run or implement a click-by-click puzzle walkthrough if interaction hit-area confidence is required.
Run interactive final tuning for hit areas, map markers, and monster/hiding balance.
Add deterministic generated-player smoke quit hook if build artifact validation must finish without process termination.
